songs.title: Bedu Pako Baramasa
songs.attribution: Audio: SoundHelix royalty-free sample (soundhelix.com) — placeholder, NOT the original recording. Title is a traditional Pahadi folk song (public domain). Artwork: picsum.photos placeholder. DEMO ONLY — do not publish.
songs.lyrics:
Bedu pako baara maasa, narendra! kaafal pako chaita
Bedu pako baara maasa, kaafal pako chaita, meri chhaila...

(Traditional Garhwali folk refrain — public domain. DEMO entry.)
